textByHash.1210c6782b06ea8d6c4ca37191635b84cd8761ac: Sorry, no. The last outlander who ate my cheese was ill for a month.
textByHash.9c341eb7135bbff29cbbcf22d2454b0977376e8e: I need your help with this!
textByHash.cfadd1dee008f29aa421b893bd0a1f2e6fa9f137: Well, we eat yak milk products every day, from when we're born. So I suppose we're used to it. Anyway I should stop yakking - [laugh] - and get on with my work.
textByHash.d31aae6c16af07fb4c7b12d3661155828032bd27: Ah, I was about to collect some yak's milk to make yak cheese.
